capabilities.summary: ripgrep is the preferred fast search primitive for repo work.
capabilities.rollback: Remove the package from the declarative package list if it regresses the host.

capabilities.summary: jq is a common structured-output dependency for scripts and validation.
capabilities.rollback: Remove the package from the declarative package list if it causes issues.

capabilities.summary: aqd is the repo workflow wrapper and should exist as a repo script, not an external dependency.
capabilities.rollback: Restore the previous repo script if a local wrapper regression was introduced.

capabilities.summary: aq-context-bootstrap is the repo-local bootstrap entrypoint for context and workflow selection.
capabilities.rollback: Restore the previous repo-local bootstrap script if the new implementation regressed.

capabilities.summary: aq-runtime-act is the repo-local planner-to-action wrapper for runtime incidents.
capabilities.rollback: Restore the previous runtime wrapper if the current repo script regressed.

package_hints: installer fallback only if declarative path is unavailable
capabilities.summary: OpenSkills is an auxiliary skill CLI and may require installer or package fallback handling.
recommended_actions: aq-context-bootstrap --task "restore missing openskills tooling" --scope system-fix --format json
capabilities.rollback: Prefer reverting installer path changes before broadening fallback behavior.

package_hints: installer fallback only if declarative path is unavailable
capabilities.summary: Claude Code uses a native installer path with fallback logic; fix declaratively where possible.
recommended_actions: aq-context-bootstrap --task "restore missing claude cli" --scope system-fix --format json
capabilities.rollback: Revert installer-path changes before broadening fallback behavior.

capabilities.summary: PRSI workflow should be available through the workflow blueprint catalog.
recommended_actions: python3 scripts/ai/aq-context-bootstrap --task "restore missing PRSI workflow blueprint" --scope prsi-operations --format json
capabilities.rollback: Restore the previous blueprint definition if workflow metadata regressed.

capabilities.summary: nixos-deployment should exist as a local skill with a valid SKILL.md body.
capabilities.rollback: Restore the skill body from git if a bad edit removed or broke it.
